prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-3PCCUTLERY-44031 Product Type: KITCHEN_KNIFE Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Stainless Steel Kitchen Cutlery Knife Set Cutting Santoku Chef Knife 3pc Description: The Beille 3pc kitchen knife set comes with 3 of the most common and essential knife types for any kitchen - a cutting knife, a Santoku knife, and a Chef’s knife.
The handles of our knives were designed with comfort and safety in mind. Ergonomic handles ensure the minimization of finger cramps and aches, especially during prolonged usage, and prevent slippage to keep your fingers safe while slicing and cutting.

Although the knives are dishwasher safe, we do recommend hand washing to preserve the blades. They are rust and corrosion resistant so you can count on this set of knives for years to come.

Constructed of high-quality stainless steel that won’t rust, this kitchen knife set features a comprehensive collection of knives that will quickly meet all your food prep needs. The molded plastic handles and steel blades will stand the test of time.

This 3pc essential kitchen cutlery set is a great wedding, housewarming, or food prep gift for beginners in the kitchen.


Cutting Knife: 7"
Santoku Knife:7"
Chef Knife: 5" Search Terms: steak knives kitchen knives set for kitchen knife sharpeners japanese knives santoku knife shun chefs knives professional series sets cutlery set organizer kitchen knife set kitchen knife bread knife chef knife kitchen accessories essentials Features: - 3PC ESSENTIAL KITCHEN KNIFE SET - The Beille 3pc kitchen knife set comes with 3 of the most common and essential knife types for any kitchen - a cutting knife, a Santoku knife, and a Chef’s knife. - ERGONOMIC HANDLES - The handles of our knives were designed with comfort and safety in mind. Ergonomic handles ensure the minimization of finger cramps and aches, especially during prolonged usage, and prevent slippage to keep your fingers safe while slicing and cutting. - EASY TO CLEAN - Although the knives are dishwasher safe, we do recommend hand washing to preserve the blades. They are rust and corrosion resistant so you can count on this set of knives for years to come! - QUALITY CONSTRUCTION - Constructed of high-quality stainless steel that won’t rust, this kitchen knife set features a comprehensive collection of knives that will quickly meet all your food prep needs. The molded plastic handles and steel blades will stand the test of time! - SPECIFICATIONS – Material: Stainless steel (rust and corrosion resistant); 3 different types of knives (cutting, santoku, and chef); Handle color: black; Dishwasher safe === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 3pc Kitchen Knife Set Stainless Steel Santoku Chef

anthropic.title_differentiation: Santoku, Chef And Cutting Knife, Ergonomic Handles, Rust Resistant, Dishwasher Safe

openai.title_differentiation: Stainless Steel Blades, Ergonomic Black Handles, Rust And Corrosion Resistant, Dishwasher Safe, 3 Essential Knives
